title: Suttum Vizhi Sudare Lyrics Ghajini
stanzas:
Suttum Vizhi Sudare Song Lyrics From Ghajini
#HarrishJayaraj #BombayJayashree, #SriramParthasarathy

Suttum vizhi sudare
Suttum vizhi sudare
en ulagam
unnai suttrudhe.

satti payyil un padam
thottu thottu urasa
en idhayam
pattri kolludhe

un vizhiyil vilundhen
vinvezhiyil parandhen
kan vizhithu
soppanam kandaen
unnaale
kan vizhithu
soppanam kandaen (2)

Mellinam marbil kanden
vallinam vizhiyil kanden
idaiyinam thaedi
illai endren.

thookkathil ularal konden
thooralil virumbi nindren
thummaal vandhaal
un ninaivai kondaen.

karuppu vellai
pookkal undaa
un kannil naan kandaen
unn kangal vandai
unnum pookkal enbaen.
unn kangal vandai
unnum pookkal enbaen.

maram koththi
manam kothi ponadhindru

theeyindri thiriyum indri

mazhai azhagaa
veyil azhagaa

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses deep feelings of love and admiration, portraying how the protagonist's world revolves around their beloved.

How does this song fit into the plot of Ghajini?

In Ghajini, this song highlights the romantic relationship between the lead characters, showcasing their emotional connection.

Who are the singers of Suttum Vizhi Sudare?

The song is beautifully sung by Bombay Jayashree and Sriram Parthasarathy.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Suttum Vizhi Sudare was composed by Harrish Jeyaraj.

When was the song released?

The song was released on September 29, 2005.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Suttum Vizhi Sudare, the protagonists express their profound love for each other, encapsulating the beauty of romance. The song serves as a backdrop to pivotal moments in Ghajini, enhancing the emotional depth of the narrative. With its soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics, it evokes feelings of longing and devotion. The collaboration between the talented singers and the composer creates a timeless piece that resonates with anyone who has experienced love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Suttum Vizhi Sudare from Ghajini is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With the enchanting voices of Bombay Jayashree and Sriram Parthasarathy, this song weaves a magical tapestry of emotions. The soulful composition by Harrish Jeyaraj elevates the romantic vibe, making it a timeless favorite for lovers everywhere.
stanzaMeanings: Your beautiful eyes surround me, my world revolves around you.
Touching your feet, my heart is filled with emotions.
I have fallen into your eyes, I have flown in your gaze, I have seen dreams because of you.
I saw the beauty of the soft clouds, I saw the beauty in your eyes, I say there is no other like you.
I saw the gentle beauty in the clouds, I saw the strong beauty in your eyes, I say there is no one like you.
I have fallen asleep in your thoughts, I am waiting in the breeze, I have held onto your memories.
Are there black and white flowers in your eyes? I have seen them, I say your eyes are like blooming flowers.
Your beautiful eyes surround me, my world revolves around you.
Touching your feet, my heart is filled with emotions.
I have fallen into your eyes, I have flown in your gaze, I have seen dreams because of you.
I have broken the tree, I have broken my heart, I have given life from the body to the soul.
I have seen the fire without flames, I have realized that the stars burn, I have seen this too.
Rain is beautiful, the sun is beautiful, when you are angry, the sun is beautiful, when you are angry, the sun is beautiful.
Your beautiful eyes surround me, my world revolves around you.
Touching your feet, my heart is filled with emotions.
I have fallen into your eyes, I have flown in your gaze, I have seen dreams because of you.
